'''Ashpidar''' was the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Esfandia Long-Range Communications Base]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. A [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Antar 4/Legends|Antar 4]], she was once engaged to a commercial entrepreneur, with whom she intended to raise a family. However, he was killed in a mining accident. Devastated, she left Antar 4, and had not been back in twenty years. During the [[Battle of Esfandia]], Commander Ashpidar was attacked by [[Tegg]], an [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] [[Peace Brigade]]r at the facility, who tied electrical wires to her cones. Nevertheless, Ashpidar managed to survive the attack.
